name: LighterPack importer

releases.author: nsiniscalchi
releases.description:
First public release.

Import and manage packing lists from lighterpack.com directly into your Obsidian vault.
Converts a shared LighterPack packing list -including categories, items, weights, and chart- into a structured collection of Markdown notes and a summary page.
